'''竏營-ng-k-t''' ('''kazangketoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wuffle|wuffle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ng-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wuffle|wuffle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營-ng-k-t
|-
! Lemma
| kazangketoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizangketoko|thizangketoko]] || [[word:jizangketoko|jizangketoko]] || [[word:shizangketoko|shizangketoko]] || [[word:kizangketoko|kizangketoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzangketoko|thuthuzangketoko]] || [[word:jujuzangketoko|jujuzangketoko]] || [[word:shushuzangketoko|shushuzangketoko]] || [[word:kukuzangketoko|kukuzangketoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozangketoko|thozangketoko]] || [[word:jozangketoko|jozangketoko]] || [[word:shozangketoko|shozangketoko]] || [[word:kozangketoko|kozangketoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦzangketoko|thﾃｦzangketoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦzangketoko|jﾃｦzangketoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦzangketoko|shﾃｦzangketoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦzangketoko|kﾃｦzangketoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazangketoko|thazangketoko]] || [[word:jazangketoko|jazangketoko]] || [[word:shazangketoko|shazangketoko]] || [[word:kazangketoko|kazangketoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
